description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5 Docker image with a cache on the vendor directory. Define a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build, then publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact and only runs on the master branch. Also define a test job that runs in the test stage, runs the same four commands, and is excluded from the master branch. No services are required.
